app.title: KPB Admin
app.tagline: Student requests, counseling, content, and operational follow-up.

shell.description: Mobile-facing content, case operations, and team workflows live from this workspace.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Use your KPB email to access the operations workspace.

overview.title: Overview
overview.subtitle: Activity overview, the North Star metric and priority actions at a glance.
overview.submittedThisWeekHint: New submissions over the last 7 days
overview.northStarTitle: Qualified WhatsApp leads / week — North Star
overview.northStarHint: By lead creation week — converted leads count as qualified.
overview.funnelHint: Signup → case → submission → purchase: the signup-to-case step is lever #1.

competitionReadiness.title: Competition readiness
competitionReadiness.subtitle: Review requests, verified evidence, and AI operations based only on backend data.
competitionReadiness.backendAuthority: Displayed capabilities only adapt the interface. The backend remains authoritative for role, scope, assignment, purpose, and audit.
competitionReadiness.accessDeniedDescription: Your role cannot access any section in this hub. Server authorization is still required when an action is visible.
competitionReadiness.endpointUnavailableDescription: The interface is ready, but the corresponding service has not been published. No demonstration data replaces the server response.
competitionReadiness.unexpectedError: The hub could not be displayed.
competitionReadiness.requestsEmptyDescription: No server request matches the selected filters.
competitionReadiness.requestsTableNote: Select an authorized request to inspect it. The backend still checks assignment and scope.
competitionReadiness.metadataOnlyNote: Your role receives metadata only; documents and full details stay hidden.
competitionReadiness.metadataOnlyDescription: Details and documents are not open to this role. Any conversion must be authorized and orchestrated by the backend.
competitionReadiness.selectRequestDescription: Details, explicitly shared documents, and authorized actions will appear here.
competitionReadiness.requestDetailErrorDescription: The selected request could not be loaded or is outside your server scope.
competitionReadiness.noSharedDocuments: No active document is shared for this request.
competitionReadiness.documentAccessRestricted: Document access is not authorized for this role or projection.
competitionReadiness.evidenceEndpointUnavailable: The secure evidence access service is not available yet.
competitionReadiness.assignmentDescription: Only active counselors allowed by the server scope are offered.
competitionReadiness.triageSummaryPlaceholder: Summarize the checks performed and the next step.
competitionReadiness.missingItemsPlaceholder: One item per line or separated by commas.
competitionReadiness.missingItemsRequired: Enter at least one missing item.
competitionReadiness.assignmentRequiredForTriage: Assign an active counselor before marking the request as triaged.
competitionReadiness.commercialRedactedDescription: This projection contains authorized metadata only. No student message or shared document is exposed before server-side conversion.
competitionReadiness.conversionDescription: Conversion includes the current version and remains controlled by the backend.
competitionReadiness.actionSaved: The server response confirmed the update.
competitionReadiness.actionFailed: The backend rejected or could not apply the action.
competitionReadiness.actionForbidden: Action forbidden: your role, assignment, or server scope does not allow it.
competitionReadiness.actionConflict: The resource changed or is no longer available. Data was refreshed; review it before retrying.
competitionReadiness.actionEndpointUnavailable: The mutation endpoint is not available yet.
competitionReadiness.actionAuthorityNote: No state changes locally before server confirmation. A visible action may still be rejected based on assignment or scope.
competitionReadiness.convertConfirmTitle: Convert this request to a case?
competitionReadiness.convertConfirmDescription: The backend will validate triage, commercial authorization, version, and idempotency before creating anything.
competitionReadiness.transitionConfirmDescription: The backend will validate status, assignment, and version before applying this audited transition.
competitionReadiness.availabilityDescription: Create and manage real slots, then offer up to three options to the applicant.
competitionReadiness.explicitOffsetRequired: Use an ISO date with Z or an explicit offset, for example +01:00.
competitionReadiness.slotMustBeFuture: The start must be in the future.
competitionReadiness.slotEndAfterStart: The end must be after the start.
competitionReadiness.slotDurationMaximum: A slot cannot exceed eight hours.
competitionReadiness.invalidTimezone: Enter a valid IANA timezone, for example Africa/Niamey.
competitionReadiness.timezoneSafetyNote: No date is sent without an explicit UTC offset; the IANA timezone remains stored for student display.
competitionReadiness.noAvailabilitySlots: No future slot was returned for this counselor.
competitionReadiness.offerSlotsDescription: Select one to three availabilities belonging to the assigned counselor. Expiry must precede every slot.
competitionReadiness.offerExpiresAtLabel: Offer expiry ISO with UTC offset
competitionReadiness.offerExpiryError_invalid_datetime: Add a valid ISO date with an explicit UTC offset.
competitionReadiness.offerExpiryError_expiry_not_future: Expiry must be in the future.
competitionReadiness.offerExpiryError_expiry_too_late: Expiry must be within the next thirty days.
competitionReadiness.offerExpiryError_expiry_after_slot: The offer must expire before every selected slot.
competitionReadiness.selectOneSlot: Select at least one available slot.
competitionReadiness.slotOfferStateUnavailable: Slots can only be offered while the request is triaged or an earlier offer can be renewed.
competitionReadiness.slotsOffered: The slots were offered and the request was refreshed.
competitionReadiness.cancelAvailabilityConfirmDescription: A booked slot cannot be cancelled. The backend will withdraw associated active offers.
competitionReadiness.offerSlotsConfirmDescription: {count} slot(s) will be offered. The offer expires at {expiresAt}.
competitionReadiness.outcomeCapabilityRequired: Outcome verification capability is required to open this section.
competitionReadiness.outcomesEmptyDescription: No server outcome matches the selected filters.
competitionReadiness.outcomesTableNote: A student report is never shown as verified without a server response and audit trail.
competitionReadiness.selectOutcomeDescription: Evidence, provenance, and verification history will appear here.
competitionReadiness.outcomeDetailErrorDescription: The details could not be loaded or are outside your server scope.
competitionReadiness.noEvidence: No evidence is attached to this outcome.
competitionReadiness.historicalOutcomeReadOnly: A newer version has superseded this decision. It remains visible for history without verification actions.
competitionReadiness.verificationNotesPlaceholder: Describe only the check performed; do not copy sensitive document data.
competitionReadiness.verificationSaved: The verification was confirmed by the backend.
competitionReadiness.verificationFailed: The backend did not apply the verification.
competitionReadiness.verificationConflict: This outcome changed after it was opened. The details were refreshed; review them before retrying.
competitionReadiness.outcomeForbidden: Verification is forbidden by the backend role, scope, or independence rule.
competitionReadiness.evidenceAccessForbidden: Access to this evidence is forbidden by scope or active consent.
competitionReadiness.verificationAuthorityNote: Verification always waits for the server response; an institutional decision is never inferred from a case status.
competitionReadiness.verificationConfirmDescription: The mutation includes the current version and will be audited by the backend.
competitionReadiness.aiCapabilityRequired: AI operations read capability is required.
competitionReadiness.aiReadOnlyNote: This panel is strictly read-only in this delivery. No budget, prompt, or feature flag can be changed here.
competitionReadiness.killSwitchUnavailable: No flag read endpoint is published, so its state is not guessed.
competitionReadiness.aiAttemptsNote: Costs and outcomes come from the server ledger; no local estimate is injected.
competitionReadiness.aiAttemptsEmpty: The server returned no AI attempt.
competitionReadiness.agreementsCapabilityRequired: Partner agreement management capability is required.
competitionReadiness.agreementsEmptyDescription: No server agreement matches the selected filters.
competitionReadiness.agreementsTableNote: Only the current revision is actionable. Effective permissions are still verified by the backend.
competitionReadiness.createAgreementDescription: Enter the exact contractual scope. Active status requires a signature and start date.
competitionReadiness.createAgreementConfirmDescription: The backend will record an audited revision. Selected capabilities are effective only while the agreement is valid.
competitionReadiness.agreementCreated: The backend created the partner agreement.
competitionReadiness.agreementUpdated: The backend confirmed a new agreement revision.
competitionReadiness.immutableRevisionNote: A material change creates a new immutable revision; history is never overwritten.
competitionReadiness.agreementRevisionDescription: Update contractual status and dates. The previous revision remains intact in history.
competitionReadiness.agreementRevisionConfirmDescription: The backend will revalidate the current version and record changes in a new immutable revision.
competitionReadiness.agreementRevisionValidationError: Check UTC dates; end must follow start and an active agreement requires signature and start date.
competitionReadiness.selectAgreementDescription: Validity, authorized capabilities, and auditable transitions will appear here.
competitionReadiness.agreementStatusConfirmDescription: The backend will revalidate version, dates, signature, scope, and evidence before this transition.
competitionReadiness.pilotsCapabilityRequired: Pilot management or recruitment capability is required.
competitionReadiness.pilotsEmptyDescription: No server pilot matches the selected filters.
competitionReadiness.pilotsTableNote: Participant counts and consent coverage are aggregated; no participant identity is displayed.
competitionReadiness.createPilotDescription: Define the hypothesis, population, metrics, and protocol before recruitment.
competitionReadiness.createPilotConfirmTitle: Create this pilot as a draft?
competitionReadiness.createPilotConfirmDescription: Creation will be audited. Recruitment remains blocked without active consent and a valid partner agreement.
competitionReadiness.pilotUpdated: The backend confirmed the pilot status.
competitionReadiness.pilotAgreementRequirementNote: An active partner agreement with a recruitment purpose and active research consent remain mandatory before enrolment.
competitionReadiness.selectPilotDescription: Protocol, aggregate cohorts, and authorized transitions will appear here.
competitionReadiness.pilotStatusConfirmDescription: The backend will verify version, protocol, agreements, dates, and scope before the transition.
competitionReadiness.cohortsPrivacyNote: This view receives no names, contact details, or student identifiers.
competitionReadiness.cohortsEndpointUnavailable: The aggregate cohort endpoint is not available yet.
competitionReadiness.cohortsEmptyDescription: Create a cohort before consented participant enrolment.
competitionReadiness.createCohortConfirmDescription: Inclusion and exclusion rules will be frozen and audited with this version.
competitionReadiness.impactCapabilityRequired: Impact aggregate read capability is required.
competitionReadiness.impactVerifiedOnlyNote: Impact KPIs use only verified outcomes and versioned definitions. Small samples remain suppressed from public projections.
competitionReadiness.impactNoPilotDescription: Select an authorized pilot to load its methodological report.
competitionReadiness.reportsLoadError: Unable to load the impact report.
competitionReadiness.reportsEndpointUnavailable: The reporting endpoint is not available yet.
competitionReadiness.impactMetricsEmptyDescription: No verified metric covers this period yet.
competitionReadiness.reportWatermark: Data through {date}. Values suppressed for small samples remain empty.
competitionReadiness.snapshotsImmutableNote: A correction creates a new version; no existing snapshot is modified.
competitionReadiness.snapshotsEndpointUnavailable: The snapshot read endpoint is not available yet.
competitionReadiness.snapshotsEmptyDescription: Freeze a first period after validating source data.
competitionReadiness.freezeSnapshotConfirmDescription: This operation is immutable. Verify the period, source watermark, and pilot version before confirming.
competitionReadiness.snapshotFrozen: The backend generated the immutable snapshot.
competitionReadiness.snapshotFormValidationError: Enter valid UTC dates; end must follow start and the source watermark must cover the period.
competitionReadiness.dataRoomPrivacyNote: The export contains only the authorized aggregate snapshot. No PII, storage key, or object URL is displayed in this interface.
competitionReadiness.dataRoomLoadError: Unable to load data room export history.
competitionReadiness.dataRoomEndpointUnavailable: The data room export endpoint is not available yet.
competitionReadiness.dataRoomEmptyDescription: No aggregate export has been produced for this pilot yet.
competitionReadiness.dataRoomReadOnlyNote: Your role may inspect aggregate receipts but cannot create a new export.
competitionReadiness.dataRoomExportConfirmDescription: The backend will verify purpose, scope, snapshot, and absence of personal data before producing the export.
competitionReadiness.dataRoomExportCreated: The backend created the data room export.
competitionReadiness.dataRoomFormValidationError: Select a snapshot, a valid purpose, and a future expiry.
competitionReadiness.dataRoomReceiptDescription: {format} format · expiry {date}. No direct link is exposed.
competitionReadiness.impactFormValidationError: Check identifiers, ISO-2 codes, UTC dates, and required JSON objects.

cases.title: Cases
cases.subtitle: Track student cases and their progress.
cases.tableNote: Live case pipeline — select a row to update status, assignment, tasks, and notes.
cases.taskSuccess: Task added to the selected case.
cases.noteSuccess: Internal note added to the case.

users.title: Users and roles
users.subtitle: Manage team accounts and their roles.
users.tableNote: Counselor, commercial, moderator, content, and admin access for the KPB team.
users.resetPasswordHint: Issues a fresh temp password and signs the operator out of any active session.
users.credentialHint: Shown once — copy it and share it privately. Re-issue a new one anytime from the operator's panel.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Metrics and exports for operational monitoring.
reports.funnelSubtitle: Pipeline from student signups to paid services.
reports.revenueSubtitle: Revenue recognized after manual or provider payment, grouped by in-app SKU and originating destination.
reports.empty: No data for this section yet.

content.title: Content
content.subtitle: Manage mobile content: parcours, articles and media.
content.offersSubtitle: KPB consultative and premium offers that can surface in the mobile app.
content.offerCreated: Service offer published to the operations catalog.
content.destinationsSubtitle: Accompaniment countries shown in the mobile explore experience.
content.destinationError: Unable to save the support destination.
content.articlesSubtitle: Guidance articles surfaced on home, scholarships, and community entry points.
content.articleCreated: Article added to the editorial queue.
content.author: Author
content.parcoursSubtitle: Free “Parcours” stories shown in the mobile app — curated YouTube videos and imported written interviews. Fill the YouTube ID for a video story; leave it empty for a written testimonial.
content.thumbnailUrl: Thumbnail URL (optional — videos derive one from the YouTube ID)
content.interviewFr: Interview FR — JSON array of { question, answer } (written stories only)
content.interviewEn: Interview EN — JSON array of { question, answer } (optional; falls back to FR)
content.parcoursError: Unable to save the parcours story.
content.parcoursDeleteError: Unable to delete the parcours story.
content.interviewNotArray: expected a JSON array of { question, answer }.
content.interviewItemInvalid: an item is not an object

verification.title: Catalog verification
verification.subtitle: Catalog verification queue before publishing.
verification.loadError: Unable to load the verification queue.
verification.tableNote: Fees, deadlines, and program facts are re-checked on the cadence defined per category above.

scholarships.title: Scholarship moderation
scholarships.subtitle: Moderate the scholarships offered to students.
scholarships.requirementError: Unable to update the application type.
scholarships.stepValidationError: Step number and title (FR) are required.
scholarships.forecastHint: These indicative dates are shown as estimates and do not send notifications.
scholarships.forecastValidationError: Academic year and both estimated dates are required.
scholarships.activationHint: This publishes confirmed dates and notifies subscribed students once.
scholarships.activationApprovalHint: Approve the scholarship before opening its cycle.
scholarships.activationValidationError: Academic year and both dates are required.
scholarships.activationDateError: The closing date must be after the opening date.
scholarships.activationSuccess: Cycle opened and subscribed students notified.
scholarships.tableNote: Entries come from the scholarship feed; select a row to review and moderate it.
scholarships.selectHint: Select a scholarship to review it.
scholarships.editorPartialDataWarning: This API version does not yet return the full record in moderation. Only fields you edit will be sent, preserving existing data.
scholarships.videosHint: Paste a YouTube URL. The app creates the player only after the student takes action.
scholarships.videoApiUnavailable: Video endpoints are not available on this backend yet. The rest of the editor remains usable.
scholarships.videoValidationError: A valid YouTube URL and French title are required.

community.title: Community
community.subtitle: Moderate the community and forum discussions.
community.categoryError: Unable to save the forum category.
community.tagError: Unable to save the topic tag.
community.categoriesHint: Structure the student community by adding visible topic families.
community.tagsHint: Add lightweight tags used to guide discussions and discovery.
community.editHint: Select a row to edit it in the form above.
community.moderationNote: Reported items stay listed here; follow-up and escalation are handled manually by the moderation team.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Notification campaigns and delivery tracking.
notifications.filtersJsonError: Filters JSON is invalid. Please enter valid JSON.
notifications.templatesHint: Create reusable push, in-app, or email templates for group or case-specific communication.
notifications.campaignsHint: Launch a grouped reminder, a segmented push, or a case-specific update directly from operations.
notifications.campaignsNote: Select a campaign to inspect its deliveries below.
notifications.deliveriesHint: Delivery tracking for the selected campaign.
notifications.deliveriesEmpty: No delivery recorded for this campaign yet.

serviceSales.title: Service sales
serviceSales.subtitle: Track service purchases and advisory follow-up.
serviceSales.updateError: Unable to update the service purchase.
serviceSales.tableNote: Sales recorded by the KPB team; select a purchase to update its lifecycle and internal notes.
serviceSales.selectHint: Select a purchase to manage it.

errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.body: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again, or contact the platform team if it persists.
errors.notFoundBody: The page you are looking for does not exist or has moved.
